notes: Source is the official Mersive documentation site. The Gen3 Pod is a wireless presentation and collaboration appliance (not a traditional AV switcher or display), categorized here as 'other'. Two HDMI outputs support either 1x 4K display (via HDMI Out 1 only) or 2x 1080p displays. HDMI In is for local wired content. The device has no RS-232, contact closure, or dedicated control port. Power is either DC barrel OR PoE+ via the Ethernet port — not both simultaneously. The 3.5mm Stereo Out is a separate analog audio output in addition to HDMI audio (7.1 via HDMI). No rack mount form factor — desktop unit (184.2 x 86.2 x 26.3 mm).

ports.name: HDMI Out 1
ports.note: HDMI 2.0; supports up to 4K when used as sole display output

ports.name: HDMI Out 2
ports.note: HDMI 1.4; supports up to 1080p; 4K only available on HDMI Out 1 when used alone

ports.name: USB-C
ports.note: Reserved for future features per Mersive documentation

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: Gigabit Ethernet with PoE+ support (IEEE 802.3 Type 2); device can be powered via this port instead of DC barrel

ports.name: DC Power In
ports.note: 12VDC, 2A max; 5.5mm OD / 2.1mm ID, center positive. UL/IEC/EN certified PS2/LPS supply. Mutually exclusive with PoE+ power.
